LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyLuckyCloverSymbolFeature1: During any spin, Lucky Clover symbol appearing anywhere will remain on the reels until the end of the spin.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyLuckyCloverSymbolFeature2: At the end of the spin, each Lucky Clover symbol (if any) will reveal either a Level-up symbol or a Multiplier symbol with the value of x2 to x20.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyLuckyCloverSymbolFeature3: If a Level-up symbol is revealed, all symbols on the reels will be transformed into the next higher paying symbol.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyLuckyCloverSymbolFeature4: If a Multiplier symbol is revealed, all wins will be multiplied by the revealed value.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of every free spin, 3 Lucky Clover symbols are awarded at the top of the reels, which will take effect at the end of every free spin.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature1: The maximum win amount is %{7500}x of the bet amount.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{7500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin, any combinations of 8 or more matching symbols appear anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: If there are one or more winning combinations on the reels, all symbols that are involved in a win will be transformed to the current highest paying winning symbol on the reels and all symbols (excluding Scatter symbol and Lucky Clover symbol) that are not involved in a win will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: At every round, additional or increased winning combination will trigger more rounds until no more additional and increased winning combination.
LuckyCloverRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: When there is no more additional or increased winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.

LuckyCloverRichesRules.GeneralRules1: Lucky Clover Riches is a 5 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring sticky winning symbols, Level-up symbol and Multiplier symbol.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

LuckyCloverRichesRules.GeneralRules3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.
LuckyCloverRichesRules.GeneralRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
